description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsGreen sling bag with a concealed magnet to make the top fold overHas one long adjustable strap which runs along the sides of the bag through loops to give it a trendy lookHas one main zippered compartment with an internal zippered compartmentHas a buckle detail in frontHas a zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 21 cmDepth: 5 cm
